description: Importable SigNoz dashboard for gateway-collected agent telemetry: logs, spans, metrics, identity dimensions, smoke-test data, and ingest-health signals.
title: Agent Telemetry - Collected Data

service-name.description: Service name reported by logs, traces, or metrics.
service-name.name: service.name
service-name.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT value AS `service.name` FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day) WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

telemetry-user-email.name: telemetry.user.email
telemetry-user-email.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT value AS `telemetry.user.email` FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day) WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

telemetry-team-id.name: telemetry.team.id
telemetry-team-id.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT value AS `telemetry.team.id` FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day) WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

agent-tool.name: agent.tool
agent-tool.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT value AS `agent.tool` FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day UNION ALL SELECT 'codex' UNION ALL SELECT 'claude_code' UNION ALL SELECT 'cursor' UNION ALL SELECT 'custom' UNION ALL SELECT 'unknown') WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

agent-capture-profile.description: Trusted capture profile from auth metadata.
agent-capture-profile.name: agent.capture.profile
agent-capture-profile.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT value AS `agent.capture.profile` FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day UNION ALL SELECT 'normal' UNION ALL SELECT 'max' UNION ALL SELECT 'unknown') WHERE value != '' ORDER BY value

widgets.title: Logs Received Over Time
widgets.description: Log records collected through the gateway over the selected time range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Spans Received Over Time
widgets.description: Trace spans collected through the gateway over the selected time range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Metrics Received Over Time
widgets.description: Metric points collected through the gateway over the selected time range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(intDiv(points.unix_milli, 1000)), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS ts, count() AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, resource_attrs FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE unix_milli BETWEEN ({{.start_timestamp}} - 86400) * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint, resource_attrs) AS series USING fingerprint WHERE points.unix_milli BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Events By Tool
widgets.description: Collected logs, spans, and metric points grouped by normalized agent tool.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT dimension AS `agent.tool`, sum(logs) AS logs, sum(spans) AS spans, sum(metric_points) AS metric_points, sum(total) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, count() AS logs, 0 AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, count() AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, 0 AS spans, count() AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, resource_attrs FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE unix_milli BETWEEN ({{.start_timestamp}} - 86400) * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint, resource_attrs) AS series USING fingerprint WHERE points.unix_milli BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension) GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Events By User
widgets.description: Collected logs, spans, and metric points grouped by authenticated user email.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT dimension AS `telemetry.user.email`, sum(logs) AS logs, sum(spans) AS spans, sum(metric_points) AS metric_points, sum(total) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, count() AS logs, 0 AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, count() AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, 0 AS spans, count() AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, resource_attrs FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE unix_milli BETWEEN ({{.start_timestamp}} - 86400) * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint, resource_attrs) AS series USING fingerprint WHERE points.unix_milli BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension) GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Events By Team
widgets.description: Collected logs, spans, and metric points grouped by team id.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT dimension AS `telemetry.team.id`, sum(logs) AS logs, sum(spans) AS spans, sum(metric_points) AS metric_points, sum(total) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, count() AS logs, 0 AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, count() AS spans, 0 AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension UNION ALL SELECT coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS dimension, 0 AS logs, 0 AS spans, count() AS metric_points, count() AS total FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, resource_attrs FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE unix_milli BETWEEN ({{.start_timestamp}} - 86400) * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint, resource_attrs) AS series USING fingerprint WHERE points.unix_milli BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} GROUP BY dimension) GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Latest Telemetry Records
widgets.description: Most recent log records with trusted identity and collection dimensions.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) AS time, severity_text AS severity, body, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS service, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS user, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS team, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS tool, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') AS profile FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Latest Traces
widgets.description: Most recent spans with trusted identity and collection dimensions.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT timestamp AS time, name, duration_nano, trace_id, span_id, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS service, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') AS user, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') AS team, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') AS tool, coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') AS profile FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Smoke Test Visibility
widgets.description: Counts aotel-smoke logs, spans, and metric points across signals.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT 'logs' AS signal, count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} AND (positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'aotel-smoke') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(attributes_string['event.name'], 'aotel-smoke') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(attributes_string['test.name'], 'aotel-smoke') > 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'spans' AS signal, count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.start_timestamp_nano}}) AND fromUnixTimestamp64Nano({{.end_timestamp_nano}}) AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} AND (positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'aotel-smoke') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(attributes_string['event.name'], 'aotel-smoke') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(attributes_string['test.name'], 'aotel-smoke') > 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'metrics' AS signal, count() AS value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 AS points INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, resource_attrs, metric_name FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE unix_milli BETWEEN ({{.start_timestamp}} - 86400) * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint, resource_attrs, metric_name) AS series USING fingerprint WHERE points.unix_milli BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} * 1000 AND {{.end_timestamp}} * 1000 AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.user.email'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.user.email}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['telemetry.team.id'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.telemetry.team.id}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.tool'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.tool}} AND coalesce(nullIf(series.resource_attrs['agent.capture.profile'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.agent.capture.profile}} AND positionCaseInsensitive(series.metric_name, 'aotel') > 0

widgets.title: Ingest Health
widgets.description: Service-scoped collector and gateway error/refusal/drop signals. Filters only by service because health logs may not carry tenant attributes.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') AS service, severity_text AS severity, count() AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp}} - 1800 AND {{.end_timestamp}} AND coalesce(nullIf(resources_string['service.name'], ''), 'unknown') IN {{.service.name}} AND (positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'error') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'refused') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'dropping data') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'exporting failed') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, 'connection refused') > 0) GROUP BY service, severity ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50
